fact.fact: KETRACO has constructed 5,476Km of transmission lines in Kenya.
fact.source_document: Transmission Master Plan and Ethiopia-Kenya HVDC

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the number of transmission lines constructed by KETRACO.

fact.fact: KETRACO has constructed 39 substations in Kenya.
fact.source_document: Transmission Master Plan and Ethiopia-Kenya HVDC

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the number of substations constructed.

fact.fact: KETRACO has completed 38 transmission projects in Kenya.
fact.source_document: Transmission Master Plan and Ethiopia-Kenya HVDC

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the number of completed projects.

fact.fact: KETRACO has 27 ongoing transmission projects in Kenya.
fact.source_document: Transmission Master Plan and Ethiopia-Kenya HVDC

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the number of ongoing projects.

synthesis.content: KETRACO has constructed 5,476Km of transmission lines and 39 substations in Kenya, completing 38 transmission projects and with 27 ongoing projects. The construction of transmission lines and substations contributes to grid access in Kenya. KETRACO's efforts include both completed and ongoing transmission projects. The scope of these projects is national, covering various parts of Kenya.

The scope of these projects is national, covering various parts of Kenya.
